rationale.R1.3: The output mentions disagreement-based active sampling but doesn't explicitly link it to specific claims in the text.

rationale.R1.7: No explicit citations are flagged as missing or incorrect.
rationale.RX.1: States uncertainty about the 23% reduction claim and flags potential issues with cited works.
rationale.RX.3: Claims to cover exactly the agreed-upon dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: No indication of introducing new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Doesn't provide traceability for edits made.
